channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Trump weighs in on H-1B debate, backs immigration visas
item.description: “I’ve always liked the visas, I have always been in favor of the visas. That’s why we have them,” Trump said in a phone interview with The New York Post published Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: Netflix? More like Netfix - world's most popular streaming service is tied at the neck with its biggest rival, and doesn't even know how much it spends on cloud computing
item.description: Netflix relies on its rival’s technology to deliver its own service and doesn’t know how much it’s paying.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: DJIin 2024: the drone-maker's highs and lows, plus what to expect in 2025
item.description: It's been quite a year for DJI – we've looked back at all of its best launches, plus what to expect from the drone king in what could be a turbulent 2025.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Trump asks Supreme Court to delay TikTok ban so he can weigh in after he takes office
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has asked the Supreme Court to pause the potential TikTok ban from going into effect until his administration can pursue a “political resolution” to the issue.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: New York state government to monitor its use of AI under a new law
item.description: ALBANY, N.Y. (AP) — New York state government agencies will have to conduct reviews and publish reports that detail how they're using artificial intelligence software, under a new law signed by Gov. Kathy Hochul.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: How to put down your phone in 2025
item.description: There are certain social media rules we can all agree on: Ghosting a conversation is impolite, and replying “k” to a text is the equivalent of a backhand slap (violent, wrong, and rude).
item.dc:creator: Steffi Cao, Fast Company

item.title: People who visit adult or gambling websites double their risk of malware
item.description: Visiting adult and gambling websites doubles the risk of inadvertently installing malware onto work devices, according to a new study. Fabio Massacci at the University of Trento and Vrije University in Amsterdam presented the findings of a massive analysis of real-life data from around the world.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: A 9th telecoms firm has been hit by a massive Chinese espionage campaign, the White House says
item.description: A top White House official says a ninth U.S. telecoms firm has been confirmed to have been hacked as part of a sprawling Chinese espionage campaign that gave officials in Beijing access to private texts and phone conversations of an unknown number of Americans.
item.dc:creator: Eric Tucker, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lincoln returns to port after proving out ‘game changing’ connectivity
item.description: On its latest deployment, the Nimitz-class carrier went from slow military satellite uplinks to modern capabilities that move terabytes of data each day. The post Lincoln returns to port after proving out ‘game changing’ connectivity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jared Serbu, Federal News Network

item.title: Why I’m skipping the PS5 Pro in 2025 and upgrading my gaming PC instead
item.description: I’m not buying a PS5 Pro in 2025 – instead I’m picking up a very long HDMI cable and a new GPU for my gaming PC.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Sign PDFs easily in Preview on Apple devices
item.description: With electronic signatures becoming more common, Kurt the CyberGuy explains how to produce your digital John Hancock for online documents.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The top Google Pixel tips of 2024
item.description: More and more, there are Android tips — and then there are Pixel tips. Owning a Google Pixel phone has become a ticket of sorts to a uniquely top-tier type of Android experience.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: YouTube has a new plan to combat clickbait
item.description: Thumbnails play the YouTube equivalent of a movie poster, aiming to draw your attention to click and watch when you have hundreds of videos clogging your recommended content.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: What is an IT consultant? Roles, types, salaries, and how to become one
item.description: The IT function within organizations has become far more complex in recent years. Enterprise infrastructures have expanded far beyond the traditional ones focused on company-owned and -operated data centers.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Undersea power cable linking Finland and Estonia hit by outage, prompting investigation
item.description: FRANKFURT, Germany (AP) — A power cable linking Finland and Estonia under the Baltic Sea suffered an outage, prompting an investigation, Finnish Prime Minister Petteri Orpo said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: How iOS 18.2 now lets you share your AirTag's location with anyone
item.description: iOS 18.2 lets AirTag owners securely share item locations with trusted individuals. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson examines the powerful new feature.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The top Windows PC tips of 2024
item.description: The end of the year means it’s time to reflect on what’s really important in life: friends, family — and Windows PC tips. That may sound silly, but I’ve always believed it’s true.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cómo hablar con la junta directiva sobre la deuda tecnológica
item.description: Cuando su director ejecutivo o director financiero le pregunta sobre el presupuesto necesario para la remediación de la deuda técnica, ¿se encuentra con dificultades para justificar la inversión? No es el único.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: TikTok is full of bogus, potentially dangerous medical advice
item.description: TikTok is the new doctor’s office, quickly becoming a go-to platform for medical advice. Unfortunately, much of that advice is sketchy at best. A new report by the healthcare software firm Tebra found 45% of medical advice on TikTok to be false or misleading.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: NASA probe attempts historic Christmas Eve approach to the sun
item.description: NASA’s Parker Solar Probe made a historic attempt to circle the sun at 6:53 a.m. EST on Tuesday, Christmas Eve, which, if successful, would be the closest-ever attempt to do so.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Navy confronting hurdles to implementing 5G-enabled technologies at scale
item.description: 5G makes exciting emerging technologies possible, but first the Department of the Navy has to solve spectrum integration, cybersecurity and acquisition hurdles. The post Navy confronting hurdles to implementing 5G-enabled technologies at scale first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: Timeshare terror leaves retired couple $50K in the hole after being scammed
item.description: The FBI is warning timeshare owners of a telemarketing scam tied to a Mexican drug cartel. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson provides steps to stay safe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WinGet: The best way to keep Windows apps updated
item.description: For more than two years, I’ve been working with WinGet daily to monitor and maintain the apps on my Windows 10 and 11 PCs. For those not already in the know, WinGet is the built-in, command-line interface to Microsoft’s Windows Package Manager service.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The AI backlash couldn’t have come at a better time
item.description: At a developers conference I attended not too long ago, attendees did little to hide their disdain every time the term “AI” was bandied about.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: DHS OCIO uses a measured approach for IT resilience strategy
item.description: DHS’ OCIO provides two major services. It acts as the CIO for the management zone, providing endpoints, services and delivery to the CXOs. The post DHS OCIO uses a measured approach for IT resilience strategy first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Michele Sandiford, Federal News Network

item.title: Chat with Santa or find out if you are on the naughty list with these tech features
item.description: You can access the new (and limited!) Santa Chat feature through the ChatGPT app by starting a new chat, hitting the live chat button.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, NewsNation
